about.title: About Me.
about.introLine1: A product designer dedicated to bridging the gap between design and engineering.
about.introLine2: My career started with code, but I quickly realized my true passion lies at the intersection of design and technology. Over the past 6 years, I've helped startups and enterprises launch successful digital products, always pursuing the perfect balance of aesthetics and functionality.
about.contactIntro: Ready to start your next project?
about.contactIntro2: Whether it's a brand new idea or an ongoing project, I'd love to hear about it.
about.thankYou: Thank you for reaching out. I'll get back to you within 24 hours.
